CustomField.description: JSON array accumulator. Each ClassifyQueueable parses its chunk's prompt response, applies the page-offset shift, and appends its segments to this field under a row lock. Read by SplitJobService.finalizeJob to feed SegmentMerger.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Auto-managed. JSON list of {document_type, source_institution, named_party, start_page, end_page} across all chunks. Cleared when the job completes.
CustomField.label: Raw Segments JSON
